TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Reptilian Kingdoms Faction.

Translations.Comment: Krokolisk (crocodile-like). Schläger = bruisers. Heavy reptilian warriors.
Molch = newt. Krieger = braves/warriors. Lesser lizard troops.
Fast cavalry riding velociraptors. Lightning strikes.
Flying cavalry on pterodactyls. Air superiority.
Fire-breathing lizard monster. Feuer = fire, Eidechse = lizard.
Kept as dinosaur name. Massive horned beast.
Swarm of small reptilian creatures from the jungle.
Schrecken = dread, Maul = maw. Terrifying predator.
Kept as dinosaur name. King of the lizards.
Religious leader of the lesser reptilians.
Uralt = ancient. Kröte = toad. Mystical amphibian sage.
